checkpoints.title: Departure from Prague
checkpoints.description: Catch your flight from Prague Airport.

checkpoints.title: Arrival at Naples, head for lunch
checkpoints.description: Arrive at Naples Airport. Take your luggage, and search for public transport tickets? Then go to the best pizza place in Naples.

checkpoints.title: Lunch at Pizzeria da Michele
checkpoints.description: The ultimate best pizza on earth. Be prepared to wait in line, but it's worth it.

checkpoints.title: Travel to Airbnb
checkpoints.description: This is going to be a long trip, so make sure you have some snackeru for Viky :-).

checkpoints.title: Arrive at Airbnb
checkpoints.description: Rest up, shower and cuddle with Viky.

checkpoints.title: Sunset at Positano
checkpoints.description: Walk around the beach and enjoy the sunset. Don't forget to buy grocery for tomorrow's breakfast.

checkpoints.title: Dinner
checkpoints.description: Explore local restaurants in Positano.

days.day: 18.7.2024 - Day Trip to Baia di Ieranto

checkpoints.title: Breakfast at the exeternal kitchen
checkpoints.description: Prepare lunch for the picnic, no restaurants much around! Pack some snacks for the hike. Bring precautions for insects and sun. Don't forget swimwear, towel, snorkel.

checkpoints.title: Travel to Nerano
checkpoints.description: Either take a bus for walk. This is where the trail starts.

checkpoints.title: Hike to Baia di Ieranto
checkpoints.description: Stunning views and a refreshing swim. Check the link for more info.

checkpoints.title: Picnic lunch
checkpoints.description: Picnic lunch by the sea.

checkpoints.title: Relax
checkpoints.description: Relax, enjoy the beach. Or explore more of the area.

checkpoints.title: Return to Nerano
checkpoints.description: Return to Nerano.

checkpoints.title: Dinner
checkpoints.description: Dinner at a local restaurant.

checkpoints.title: Morning coffee
checkpoints.description: Grab a coffee and eat breakfast at the port.

checkpoints.title: Boat Ride to Capri Turistico Port
Rent a yayak
checkpoints.description: Rent a kayak at this place, or search around the port if you find another kayak rental place.

checkpoints.title: Explore Capri on a kayak
checkpoints.description: Sail, sail, sail.

checkpoints.title: Cala Ventroso
checkpoints.description: Visit Cala Ventroso, a small hidden beach accessible only by sea. Enjoy a swim in its crystal-clear waters.

checkpoints.title: Grotta Verde - Green Cave and other caves
checkpoints.description: Famous for the play of lights created inside it.

checkpoints.title: Lunch
checkpoints.description: Lunch at a local restaurant.

checkpoints.title: Blue Grotto
checkpoints.description: Visit the famous Blue Grotto and enjoy the stunning blue waters.

checkpoints.title: Explore before return kayak
checkpoints.description: Explore the area around Capri Hydro before returning the kayak. Possible visit places: </br> • Grotta dei Marinai </br> • Grotta Rossa (caverna)

checkpoints.title: Return kayak
checkpoints.description: Return the kayak and head back to Sorrento.

checkpoints.title: Sunset at Sorrento
checkpoints.description: Walk around Piazza Tasso and visit the Villa Comunale for views. Don't forget to buy grocery for tomorrow's breakfast.

checkpoints.title: Dinner
checkpoints.description: Here are some suggestions: </br> • Porta Marina Seafood Restaurant </br>• Ndulì Osteria Di Mare </br> • Ristorante Ruccio

checkpoints.title: Walk around Sorrento
checkpoints.description: Walk around the city and enjoy the evening streets.

checkpoints.title: Breakfast
checkpoints.description: Have breakfast home, pack stuff to go to Pompei.

checkpoints.title: Lunch
checkpoints.description: Possible options: </br> • Bio Cucina Bistro Bio Pizza, Alleria Pizzeria Newpolitana

checkpoints.title: Pompei Ruins
checkpoints.description: Explore the ruins of Pompei.

checkpoints.title: Dinner
checkpoints.description: Possible options: Stuzzico by Lucius, Mercato Pompeiano.

checkpoints.title: Walk
checkpoints.description: Walk around the beach and enjoy the sunset.

checkpoints.title: Breakfast
checkpoints.description: We wake up a bit later today, enjoy breakfast at a local cafe or home. Prepare enough food for the hike.

checkpoints.title: Travel to Mount Vesuvius
checkpoints.description: Leave on time, coming late disqualifies the tickets to the park! Ticket for EAV bus can be purchased on board.

checkpoints.title: Mount Vesuvius loop hike
checkpoints.description: Tickets are bought. </br>Transaction code: VIVATK143901190784

checkpoints.title: Travel to Cantina Del Vesuvio Winery
checkpoints.description: YOU HAVE TO BE ON TIME! Tour starts at 15:30

checkpoints.title: Wine Tasting with Lunch
checkpoints.description: Walk through the vineyards and enjoy wine made from volcanic soil. Buy a bottle of Vesuvio Lacryma Christi (in translation "Tears of Christ").

checkpoints.title: Travel to Terme Vesuviane
checkpoints.description: Walk is about 3.4km or take a bus.

checkpoints.title: Thermal bath at Terme Vesuviane
checkpoints.description: Relax in the thermal baths and maybe you could also do a mud wrap :-). No clue if reservation is needed and how much it cost.

checkpoints.title: Dinner at Terrazza Due Golfi
checkpoints.description: Enjoy your dinner with stunning view on Vesuvius. This restaurant has a skyline and plays music at night, so you could stay for a little party!

days.day: Day 6 - Nature and Adventure in Pompei (22nd July 2024)

checkpoints.title: Breakfast
checkpoints.description: Have breakfast at a local cafe.

checkpoints.title: Hike
checkpoints.description: Hike up Mount Vesuvius and enjoy the breathtaking views.

checkpoints.title: Lunch
checkpoints.description: Lunch at a local restaurant.

checkpoints.title: Visit Museum
checkpoints.description: Visit the National Archaeological Museum of Naples.

checkpoints.title: Dinner
checkpoints.description: Dinner at a local restaurant.

checkpoints.title: Breakfast
checkpoints.description: Have breakfast at a local cafe.

checkpoints.title: Travel to Naples
checkpoints.description: Travel to Naples.

checkpoints.title: Check-out
checkpoints.description: Check-out from your stay in Pompei.

checkpoints.title: Lunch
checkpoints.description: Lunch at a local restaurant in Naples.

checkpoints.title: Explore Naples
checkpoints.description: Explore Naples, visit historical sites, and enjoy the local culture.

checkpoints.title: Dinner
checkpoints.description: Dinner at a local restaurant in Naples.

checkpoints.title: Departure
checkpoints.description: Catch your flight from Naples Airport.
